microsoft_auth_denied: Access denied. Please authorize the request and try again.
minecraft_services_auth_unavailable: Minecraft authentication services are temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
microsoft_auth_browser_opening: Opening Microsoft sign-in in your browser...
microsoft_auth_browser_success: Authorization is complete. You can close this browser tab and return to TensaLauncher.
microsoft_auth_browser_fallback: Browser authorization is unavailable. Falling back to Microsoft device code.
microsoft_auth_device_code_instructions: Open {url}, enter code {code}, then approve sign-in in your browser.
microsoft_auth_device_code_waiting: Use the code below to sign in, then return here and wait for confirmation.
microsoft_auth_device_code_browser_hint: The default browser should open automatically. If it does not, use the button below.
are_you_sure: Are you sure you want to do this?
minecraft_components_install_confirm_mes: Only the technical component will be installed into minecraft/versions. No new build will be created.
minecraft_components_reinstall_confirm_m: The component will be reinstalled into minecraft/versions without creating a new build.
minecraft_components_delete_message: The component will be removed from minecraft/versions.
minecraft_components_delete_used_message: This component is used by builds: {versions}. After deletion, repair those builds or reinstall the component.
minecraft_components_delete_base_message: This is the base version for components: {count}. Dependent loaders may stop launching after deletion.
version_create_install_confirm_message: Review the build name and confirm installation.
curseforge_source_missing: Select a .zip archive or manifest.json file
no_default_profile: You have not set a default profile
profile_required_message: Add a Microsoft or offline profile before launching the game. The new profile will automatically become the default profile.
version_launch_throttled: {version} is already starting. Try again in {seconds}s if you want another instance.
version_already_running: {version} is already running. Close the game before launching or updating this instance again.
version_already_running_confirm_message: Launch another instance of this build? This can conflict with logs, settings, and game files.
version_integrity_check_failed: Failed to verify or repair build {version}. Try reinstalling it.
java_path_auto_pending: Launcher Java will be installed or selected automatically when the game starts
java_selection_hint: To use another Java, add it in Settings > Java, then it will appear in this list.
custom_jvm_arguments_hint: Enter additional JVM arguments, one per line
version_section_general_desc: Name the build and choose the loader.
version_server_section_desc: Optional. When a server is set, Minecraft can open a direct connection to it after launching this build.
version_section_runtime_desc: Select the Java runtime, GPU mode, and RAM limit.
version_section_arguments_desc: Select a preset or enter your own arguments on separate lines.
version_section_appearance_desc: Upload or update the icon shown in the builds list.
version_section_diagnostics_desc: Open logs, crash reports and folders for this build.
version_report_description: Describe the problem. The launcher will attach this build's metadata, latest game log, launch diagnostics, latest crash report, and latest hs_err log when available.
version_report_message_hint: What happened, what you launched, and which actions happened before the issue...
version_report_message_required: Describe the problem before sending the report
version_crashed_open_logs: Minecraft closed with an error. Open diagnostics to inspect the latest log or crash report: {path}
launch_diagnostic_missing_minecraft: The log says Minecraft classes are missing. The launcher will try to restore the base component on the next start; if it repeats, reinstall this build.
launch_diagnostic_graphics: The log points to Sodium/OpenGL compatibility. Try updating the GPU driver or temporarily disabling Sodium in this build.
launch_diagnostic_channel_mismatch_title: Client and server mod list differ
launch_diagnostic_channel_mismatch: The server requires a mod channel that is missing on the client. Restore the removed mod or resync the pack.
launch_diagnostic_locked_file: Another Minecraft process or antivirus is holding a pack file. Close running games and retry synchronization.
launch_diagnostic_unknown: The launcher captured logs for this failed launch. Open diagnostics or send a report for deeper inspection.
diagnostic_path_missing: Diagnostic file or folder does not exist yet: {path}
version_icon_hint: PNG images work best. Square images look the sharpest.
tensacraft_description_unavailable: No description is available for this pack yet.
tensacraft_install_confirm_message: Review the pack description and confirm the installation.
tensacraft_game_directory_running: Close Minecraft for {version} before installing or updating this pack.
auth_success: Authorization is successful, you can close this window
close_launcher_on_game: Close the launcher when the game starts
ask_profile_on_launch: Ask which account to use before launch
ram_defaults: Default RAM (applies to builds without custom RAM)
installing_running_error: You cannot do this during installation
java_performance_desc: Set the Minecraft memory limit and GPU mode for this computer.
ram_slider_limit_hint: Detected RAM: {total} GB. The launcher keeps system headroom and caps Minecraft at {max} GB.
report_contact_hint: Optional email, Discord, Telegram, or nickname
launcher_behavior_desc: Language, updates and what the launcher does when the game starts.
minecraft_storage_desc: Directory used for versions, mods and assets.
macos_microphone_permissions_desc: Grant microphone access only if voice chat mods need it. The permission prompt opens only after pressing the button.
macos_microphone_permission_authorized: Microphone access is allowed for TensaLauncher
macos_microphone_permission_denied: Microphone access is denied. If TensaLauncher is not listed in macOS Microphone settings, click "Reset permission and ask again".
macos_microphone_permission_restricted: Microphone access is restricted by macOS system settings.
macos_microphone_permission_timeout: macOS did not answer the microphone permission request. Try again.
macos_microphone_permission_reset: Microphone permission was reset. Confirm the macOS system prompt.
macos_microphone_permission_reset_failed: Could not reset microphone permission for TensaLauncher. Start the launcher from the .app bundle and try again.
macos_microphone_settings_unavailable: Microphone settings are available only on macOS
setup_wizard_desc: Choose where launcher settings and profile files are stored. Minecraft data uses the standard system data folder by default; paths can be changed later in Settings.
setup_wizard_storage_issue: The selected storage folder cannot be prepared. Choose another path.
setup_wizard_storage_ready: The folder is ready for writing
world_backups_desc: The launcher creates a copy of changed worlds before starting the game. It checks level.dat: if the world has not changed since the latest automatic backup, a new archive is not created. session.lock and temporary files are skipped.
custom_java_section_desc: Add custom Java installations so each build can select them later. Java installed by the launcher is added automatically.
custom_java_path_label: Path to java, java.exe or javaw.exe
custom_java_empty: No custom Java entries added yet.
custom_java_invalid: Select a valid Java executable: java.exe, javaw.exe or java.
performance_desc: Global RAM defaults and GPU mode.
activity_center_desc: Recent launcher operations and alerts for diagnostics.
activity_active_operations_desc: Work currently tracked by the launcher.
activity_recent_events_desc: Latest progress updates, warnings and completion states.
duplicate_asm_detected_title: Duplicate ASM Classes Detected. Remove one of the modules and try again.
duplicate_asm_detected_error: Duplicate ASM classes found. Please resolve the issue and try again.
minecraft_install_failed: Failed to install Minecraft. Please check your internet connection and try again.
version_not_installed_manual: Component {version} is not installed. Reinstall it manually through the component manager.
missing_mod_loader_support: Update minecraft_launcher_lib to the latest git build to enable mod loader support.
update_available_message: A new version of the launcher is available for download
update_download_failed: Failed to download update. Please try again later.
version_not_installed_message: Component {version} is not installed. Starting automatic installation...
mods_not_supported_desc: This build doesn't support mods. Install Fabric, Forge, NeoForge or Quilt.
version_delete_warning_desc: Deleting removes this build from the launcher list. Files and backups are controlled by the switches below.
version_delete_directory_desc: Deletes this build's game folder including mods, resource packs, shaders, worlds, logs, and settings.
version_delete_backups_desc: Deletes all world backups that belong to this build.
confirm_delete_version: Delete build {version}? Review the switches below to choose which data should be removed.
version_delete_close_game_first: Close Minecraft for this build before deleting its directory.
enter_search_query: Enter search query to find mods
confirm_delete_mod: Are you sure you want to delete mod {name}?
confirm_restore_backup: Are you sure you want to restore mod {name} from backup?
confirm_delete_resourcepack: Are you sure you want to delete resource pack {name}?
world_backups_no_worlds: No worlds found for this build yet.
world_backups_empty: No backups for this world yet.
world_backup_create_failed: Failed to create backup for world {world}
world_backup_delete_failed: Failed to delete backup for world {world}
world_backup_restore_confirm: Restore world {world} from this backup? The current world folder will be replaced.
world_backup_close_game_first: Close Minecraft for this build before restoring a backup.
screenshots_empty: No screenshots for this build yet.
confirm_delete_shaderpack: Are you sure you want to delete shader {name}?
update_ready_message:
Update downloaded. Close the launcher to complete installation.

After closing, the update will be installed automatically.
minecraft_game_dir_unavailable: The configured Minecraft directory is unavailable: {path}. Fix it in Settings or version launch and installation will fail.
